query: SELECT id, serviceLine, unit, jobDate, ct1DailyRate, operationalDays, badWeatherDays, jobBill, onRig FROM well_jobs WHERE serviceLine = 'coiled-tubing' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5; SELECT * FROM oil_prices LIMIT 12;
